title: In Hollywood with Potash and Perlmutter
writer: Montague Glass, Jules Eckert Goodman, Frances Marion
actors: Alexander Carr, George Sidney, Vera Gordon
plot: Potash and Perlmutter give up their textile business to produce motion pictures. Though their initial effort is a failure, they interest a banker, Blanchard, in financing their productions, provided that they engage Rita Sismondi,...
